executiveSummary: Architecture review of clip-ai: 106 raw findings from 7 specialist reviewers (FastAPI, silent-failure, Python-core, React, TypeScript, Rust, security). After dedup: 6 critical, 21 high, 39 medium, 16 low, 1 positive. Three systemic patterns: (1) pervasive silent-failure catch-all at every layer, (2) zero authentication on backend -- any network exposure leads to total compromise, (3) concurrency hazards (lock bypass, shared state without sync, TOCTOU races) that corrupt task state. Single highest-ROI fix: add `import os` on main.py:164 (1 line prevents guaranteed crash). Most dangerous latent bug: manifest-write-failure + intermediate-cleanup in pipeline.py permanently deletes all recovery data. ffmpeg timeout gap + semaphore starvation can deadlock pipeline after 2 hangs.

top5Fixes.title: Missing os import crashes /video-info on yt-dlp fallback
top5Fixes.why: `os.name` referenced without `import os`. Any oEmbed failure triggers NameError -> 500. Frontend gets no metadata. 1-line fix, blocks core UX.

top5Fixes.title: Manifest write fail + intermediate cleanup = permanent data loss
top5Fixes.why: If highlights.json write fails (caught+logged), transcript/srt/ass files are still deleted. On restart, recover_from_storage() finds nothing. Task vanishes from UI. Rendered clips orphaned.

top5Fixes.title: ffmpeg subprocess.run lacks timeout -> pipeline deadlock
top5Fixes.why: Two subprocess.run calls without timeout. Corrupt input hangs ffmpeg -> consumes semaphore slot forever. Two hangs = pipeline deadlock. All queued tasks starve indefinitely.

top5Fixes.title: SSE task progress events silently lost when queue full
top5Fixes.why: QueueFull exception caught with bare `pass`. Progress updates, completion, or error events silently dropped. Frontend SSE listener never receives terminal event. User sees task stuck forever.

top5Fixes.title: Tauri event listeners leak in frontend useEffect
top5Fixes.why: Three listen() calls for backend-ready/error/crashed, only first unlisten captured. Backend-error/crashed listeners leak on every effect re-run. Memory grows, stale handlers fire after unmount.

systemicIssues.description: Exception handling pattern catches broad exceptions with empty handlers (pass) or returns None/generic fallback without logging the actual error. Occurs in 14+ locations across transcriber, highlighter, renderer, state, routes, and Tauri. Primary cause: defensive coding without observability. Diagnostic gaps hide real failures (auth errors, network issues, parse failures) behind generic placeholders.
systemicIssues.fix: Audit all except: pass and catch-all handlers. Log at warning/error with exception context. Route specific errors to user-facing messages. Preserve primary provider errors in LLM fallback chain.

systemicIssues.description: All endpoints (POST/DELETE/GET /tasks, /models proxy with API key forwarding, /debug/*, /health) have no authentication. Only localhost binding prevents external access. Port forwarding, Docker exposure, or reverse-proxy misconfiguration gives anyone full control: create tasks burning API credits, probe internal network via /models SSRF, read config via debug endpoints.
systemicIssues.fix: Generate random bearer token at first run per Tauri settings, validate on every request via middleware. Restrict /debug and /health to localhost or DEBUG env var.

systemicIssues.description: Multiple thread-safety violations: _update_render_progress directly mutates store._mem_tasks from thread pool thread without lock (Finding #8). is_cancelled reads set without lock (Finding #43). sanitize_env() concurrent PATH modification from thread pool (Finding #13). Tauri settings TOCTOU race (Finding #84). Check-then-act race in cancel_task (Finding #17). Python GIL prevents data corruption but not stale/inconsistent reads.
systemicIssues.fix: Use asyncio.run_coroutine_threadsafe consistently (remove fallback path). Add threading.Lock for thread-pool-accessed store methods. Remove sanitize_env() from thread functions; call once at startup. Add Mutex for Tauri settings I/O.

layerSummaries.backend: 10 Python files under app/ and app/engine/. Strongest layer: well-structured pipeline stages, async-first using asyncio.to_thread for blocking I/O, config via dataclass+dotenv, dual Redis/in-memory state store, pluggable LLM clients, double-caching for transcription. Key weaknesses: silent-failure pattern in 14+ locations (catch-all returning None, empty except blocks, unfixable f-string logging), missing timeouts on ffmpeg subprocess calls, no auth on any endpoint, race conditions across async/thread boundary, unused/skeleton code in smoothing.py (Kalman filter is no-op), duplicated constants between highlight_prompts.py and config.py, duplicated CREATION_FLAGS and helper functions. Version: 0.1.8.
layerSummaries.frontend: Next.js 15 App Router static export + React 19 + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui. Strongest: well-structured API client lib/api.ts, proper SSE consumption, clean shadcn usage, useCallback/useMemo in hot paths. Key weaknesses: monolithic 1212-line Home component, 7 separate localStorage effects, Tauri event listeners leak (only 1 of 3 unlisten captured), SSE EventSource churn from task.status in dep array, redundant SSE+polling race condition, lang='en' on Indonesian app (a11y violation), keyboard inaccessibility (div onClick without role/tabIndex), duplicate clip URL logic, unguarded JSON.parse from localStorage, empty catch blocks. Test setup exists (Vitest+MSW) but limited coverage.
layerSummaries.tauri: Rust Tauri v2 backend management. Spawns Python/FastAPI backend, manages child process lifecycle, settings I/O, log rotation ~300 lines. Key weaknesses: Job Object FFI uses PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS (overprivileged), return values silently discarded, IO_COUNTERS struct 32 bytes vs actual 48 (UB in theory, works in practice because only first field read), kill_child never calls wait on Windows (handle leak), TOCTOU race on settings read-modify-write, std::process::exit(0) bypasses Drop, 7 hardcoded port 8003 instances without constant, log write errors silently discarded, UNC path canonicalize issues. Settings stored in plaintext (API keys), CSP allows unsafe-inline.
layerSummaries.infra: CI via GitHub Actions (windows-latest only). PyInstaller -> Tauri MSI. Python 3.10, no formal backend tests (ad-hoc test_*.py only). Frontend tests: Vitest+jsdom+MSW in src/test/. Single build.yml workflow triggered on v* tags or manual dispatch. Key gap: no CI testing of backend errors (auth, ffmpeg timeout, LLM failures). No type-checking CI step. No security scanning (no CodeQL, no dependency audit). CSP in tauri.conf.json missing object-src, base-uri, form-action directives.

edgeCases.scenario: ffmpeg hangs during render (corrupt source, codec issue)
edgeCases.risk: Pipeline deadlock: semaphore slot consumed forever, 2 hangs blocks all new tasks. No user feedback.
edgeCases.mitigation: Add timeout=300/600 to subprocess.run in _cut_subclip and _mux_with_subtitles. Add queue wait timeout to semaphore acquisition in queue.py.

edgeCases.scenario: Server restart after manifest write fails but cleanup succeeded
edgeCases.risk: Task vanishes from UI despite rendered clips existing on disk. User must re-submit video.
edgeCases.mitigation: Don't clean up intermediate files unless manifest write succeeded. Keep transcript.json as recovery anchor always.

edgeCases.scenario: SSE client disconnects during final progress event
edgeCases.risk: Frontend never receives completion/error event. UI shows task processing forever despite task being done.
edgeCases.mitigation: Add SSE heartbeat (30s), detect client disconnect via request.is_disconnected(). Poll fallback should not be disabled when SSE fails.

edgeCases.scenario: Gemini/Groq API key invalid but catch-all returns None
edgeCases.risk: User sees 'Gemini returned no segments' instead of '401 Unauthorized: invalid API key'. Cannot diagnose.
edgeCases.mitigation: Re-raise exceptions from transcriber providers so caller propagates real error to user.

edgeCases.scenario: Two concurrent save_settings calls from Tauri frontend
edgeCases.risk: One write overwrites the other, silently losing API keys or config changes.
edgeCases.mitigation: Add Mutex guarding settings file access across full load-modify-save cycle. Use atomic write (tmp+rename).

edgeCases.risk: sensitivity=0 is falsy in Python: overridden to 50 (default). User cannot set most aggressive detection.
edgeCases.mitigation: Change to: sensitivity=req.sensitivity if req.sensitivity is not None else 50

edgeCases.scenario: EventSource reconnection drops events on first progress tick
edgeCases.risk: SSE effect deps include task.status. First progress event changes 'queued'->'processing', triggers re-render, tears down EventSource, recreates it. Events during gap lost.
edgeCases.mitigation: Remove task.status from SSE effect deps. Use ref to track SSE activeness. Rely on done/error events to close.

edgeCases.risk: Source videos saved to STORAGE_DIR/source_*.mp4 (not task dir). Deleted task doesn't clean source. 200MB-1GB per video.
edgeCases.mitigation: Track source file refs per task. On delete, check if other tasks reference same video_id. If not, delete source.

edgeCases.scenario: Redis pubsub receives malformed JSON message
edgeCases.risk: Events silently dropped, no logging. Frontend SSE misses updates.
edgeCases.mitigation: Add debug-level log for parse failures to aid troubleshooting rare Redis corruption scenarios.

securityPosture: Overall: WEAK. The backend operates in a trust model assuming localhost-only access, but provides zero defense-in-depth if that assumption fails. No authentication on any endpoint means any network exposure (port forwarding, Docker, misconfigured proxy) is game over: attacker can consume LLM credits via task creation, enumerate local services via /models SSRF (port scanning on localhost), read system config via /debug endpoints, and access API keys via settings.json. SSL certificate verification disabled in yt-dlp (MITM on video download). API keys stored in plaintext in Tauri settings.json. CSP allows unsafe-inline. LLM prompt injection via unsanitized transcript text is a real attack vector for an AI pipeline product. Positive findings: /models endpoint has proper SSRF protection (DNS resolution+loopback check+IP rewriting+redirect disable). Path traversal protection in media.py is well-implemented with Path.relative_to() checks.

quickWins.title: Add `import os` to main.py:164 that uses os.name
Add timeout=300 to ffmpeg subprocess.run calls in render.py
Fix sensitivity=0 truthiness bug: `if req.sensitivity is not None else 50`
Fix f-string+%s hybrid log line in transcriber.py:78 (drops error)
Move cleanup after manifest write success check in pipeline.py:179-185
Remove task.status from SSE effect deps to stop EventSource churn
Guard JSON.parse from localStorage in page.tsx:378 with try/catch
Define const BACKEND_PORT: u16 = 8003 in lib.rs (7 hardcoded instances)
Change html lang='en' to lang='id' in layout.tsx:41

allFindings.title: Missing os import causes NameError crash on yt-dlp fallback
allFindings.description: os.name referenced without import os in video_info(). The import os on line 227 is inside debug_build() and not accessible here. When oEmbed fails, yt-dlp fallback path triggers NameError: name 'os' is not defined.
allFindings.impact: /video-info endpoint returns 500 when yt-dlp fallback triggers. Frontend receives no video metadata (title, author, thumbnail). Core UX flow broken for any URL where YouTube oEmbed unavailable.
allFindings.suggestion: Add `import os` alongside existing inline imports at line 161.

allFindings.title: Manifest write failure + intermediate cleanup = permanent task data loss
allFindings.description: If highlights.json manifest write fails (caught OSError/TypeError/ValueError, logged warning only), code proceeds to delete transcript.json, transcript.srt, subtitles.ass. On restart, recover_from_storage() needs manifest or transcript.json to find task. Neither exists. Rendered clips in clips/ orphaned.
allFindings.impact: Completed task with rendered clips permanently lost from UI after server restart. User must re-submit URL and re-process entire video.
allFindings.suggestion: Move cleanup (lines 179-185) inside conditional checking manifest write success. Always keep transcript.json as recovery anchor.

allFindings.title: Individual clip render failure silently produces broken clip entry
allFindings.description: Clip render failures are caught and added to results with clip_url=None and error=str(e). Pipeline continues to completion. User sees task as completed with unplayable clips. Error string may not be surfaced in frontend UI.
allFindings.impact: User sees completed task with broken clips. No indication that some clips failed.
allFindings.suggestion: Track failed clip count. If all clips fail, mark task as error. Include failure count in completion message.

allFindings.title: Tauri event listeners leak -- only 1 of 3 unlisten captured
allFindings.description: Three listen() calls (backend-ready, backend-error, backend-crashed) but only first unlisten captured in variable. Backend-error and backend-crashed listeners never cleaned up on unmount. On effect re-run, two more listeners leak per cycle.
allFindings.impact: Memory leak, stale handler execution after component unmount, React warnings in strict mode.
allFindings.suggestion: Capture all three unlisten functions and clean up all in return.

allFindings.title: SSE EventSource churn from task.status in dependency array
allFindings.description: SSE effect has [taskId, task?.status, refresh] deps. First progress event changes status from queued to processing, triggering re-render, tearing down EventSource, recreating it. Events in reconnection window permanently lost.
allFindings.impact: Connection churn: EventSource closed and reopened on first progress event. SSE events during gap lost.
allFindings.suggestion: Remove task?.status from deps. Use ref for SSE activeness. Rely on done/error events to close.

allFindings.title: Bare except on ffprobe disables cache validation
allFindings.description: ffprobe call catches all exceptions and sets video_duration=0.0. Cache staleness check compares cached transcript duration vs video duration. With duration=0, cache verification disabled. Stale cache from different video with same filename could be served.
allFindings.impact: Wrong transcript used for highlight detection and subtitle generation if filename collision occurs.
allFindings.suggestion: Catch subprocess-specific exceptions. On ffprobe failure, log warning and consider re-transcribing.

allFindings.title: ffmpeg subprocess.run without timeout
allFindings.description: Both _cut_subclip and _mux_with_subtitles call subprocess.run(cmd, check=True) without timeout. If ffmpeg hangs, thread blocks indefinitely.
allFindings.impact: Single hanging ffmpeg consumes pipeline semaphore slot forever. Two hangs = complete pipeline deadlock. All queued tasks blocked until server restart.
allFindings.suggestion: Add timeout=300 to _cut_subclip, timeout=600 to _mux_with_subtitles. Catch TimeoutExpired and raise PipelineError.

allFindings.title: Pipeline semaphore no wait timeout -- indefinite task starvation
allFindings.description: Semaphore limits concurrent pipelines to 2 but async with waits indefinitely. If both slots consumed by hanging tasks, all queued tasks block forever with no feedback.
allFindings.impact: Complete service degradation under load. Tasks stuck in queued permanently with no error.
allFindings.suggestion: Add await asyncio.wait_for(acquire(), timeout=300) with error fallback.

allFindings.title: No authentication on any endpoint
allFindings.description: All endpoints (POST/DELETE/GET /tasks, /models with API key forwarding, /debug/*) are unauthenticated. /models proxy forwards api-key header.
allFindings.impact: If backend exposed (port forwarding, Docker, misconfigured proxy), anyone can create tasks consuming API credits, delete tasks, probe internal network via /models SSRF, enumerate config via /debug.
allFindings.suggestion: Add bearer token middleware. Generate random token at first run in Tauri settings.json. Validate on every request.

allFindings.title: Gemini provider catch-all returns None, hiding real errors
allFindings.description: Outer try/except catches all exceptions and returns None with only warning log. Caller sees Gemini returned no segments indistinguishable from normal empty result.
allFindings.impact: User error message hides actual failure reason (401, rate limit, network timeout).
allFindings.suggestion: Re-raise exceptions; let caller distinguish no segments found (None) from provider failed (exception).

allFindings.title: Groq provider catch-all returns None, hiding real errors
allFindings.description: Same as Gemini: catch-all returns None, caller sees 'Groq returned no segments'. Real failure reason hidden.
allFindings.impact: Same as Gemini: real errors hidden behind generic message.
allFindings.suggestion: Re-raise exceptions so caller propagates real error in failure chain.

allFindings.title: enqueue_task silently returns when task not found
allFindings.description: If store.get(task_id) returns None, function returns without logging or raising. Race condition between route handler and queue silently drops task.
allFindings.impact: Task submitted by user never starts. No error, no SSE events. Task stuck in queued forever.
allFindings.suggestion: Add warning log when task_id not found. Consider raising error or emitting error SSE event.

allFindings.title: QueueFull silently drops SSE events
allFindings.description: When asyncio.Queue is full during SSE publish, QueueFull exception silently caught with pass. Progress, completion, error events silently lost.
allFindings.impact: Frontend progress bar stalls or never shows completion. User thinks task still processing when done.
allFindings.suggestion: Log warning on QueueFull. For terminal events, block or drop oldest instead of newest.

allFindings.title: key={index} used for dynamic clip list and log entries
allFindings.description: Clip items and log entries use array index as key. Clips appended via SSE; active clip changes. If order changes or items removed, React reuses DOM nodes incorrectly.
allFindings.impact: Stale video players, wrong clip data for index. Log entries: lower risk but pattern encourages index keys for growing lists.
allFindings.suggestion: Use composite key of start_time+end_time or clip_url for clips. Use incrementing counter ref for logs.

allFindings.title: Redundant SSE + polling creates race conditions
allFindings.description: Both EventSource and setInterval poll run simultaneously. Poll sets task state, SSE progress events also set task state. These race, potentially overwriting newer data with stale poll results.
allFindings.impact: Double server load. Race condition: poll response (older data) arrives after SSE (newer) overwrites progress.
allFindings.suggestion: Use polling only as fallback when EventSource fails. Track SSE state in ref, skip polling when SSE active.

allFindings.title: lang='en' on Indonesian-language application
allFindings.description: html lang='en' but entire UI in Bahasa Indonesia. Screen readers apply English pronunciation to Indonesian text.
allFindings.impact: WCAG 3.1.1 violation. Screen reader users hear mispronounced words. App unusable for assistive tech.
allFindings.suggestion: Change to lang='id'.

allFindings.title: Interactive template cards use div onClick without keyboard support
allFindings.description: Div elements with onClick handlers but no role='button', tabIndex, or onKeyDown. Keyboard-only users cannot select template.
allFindings.impact: WCAG 2.1.1 violation. Core feature inaccessible to keyboard users.
allFindings.suggestion: Use button type=button or add role='button', tabIndex={0}, onKeyDown(Enter/Space).

allFindings.title: Stale closure: settings.storage_dir in crash toast action
allFindings.description: backend-crashed handler uses settings?.storage_dir captured at mount time. settings not in dependency array. If settings change, crash handler uses old path.
allFindings.impact: Stale storage dir used on restart if user changed settings before crash.
allFindings.suggestion: Use useRef to hold latest settings value, read ref.current in handler.

allFindings.title: Unguarded JSON.parse on localStorage value
allFindings.description: localStorage JSON.parse without try/catch. Corrupted data throws and crashes effect on page load.
allFindings.impact: App crashes on page load if localStorage has invalid JSON. User cannot recover without clearing storage.
allFindings.suggestion: Wrap JSON.parse in try/catch, matching pattern used elsewhere in same file.

allFindings.title: Empty catch block silently swallows polling errors
allFindings.description: Active tasks polling uses catch {} with no logging. Any fetch error silently discarded.
allFindings.impact: Impossible to debug intermittent connectivity. No indication to user that status is stale.
allFindings.suggestion: Add console.warn or equivalent logging.

allFindings.title: Unsafe FFI block missing SAFETY comment, silently discards return values
allFindings.description: Unsafe block calls CreateJobObjectW etc. Return values of SetInformationJobObject, AssignProcessToJobObject, CloseHandle silently discarded. PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS overprivileged. No SAFETY comment.
allFindings.impact: Silent failure of Job Object setup defeats zombie prevention. PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS unnecessarily broad.
allFindings.suggestion: Add SAFETY comment. Check return values and log on failure. Reduce access to PROCESS_SET_QUOTA|PROCESS_TERMINATE. Use windows crate for type-safe FFI.

allFindings.title: TOCTOU race condition on settings read-modify-write
allFindings.description: Both functions load settings from disk, modify, write back without mutex or file lock. Concurrent calls overwrite each other. fs::write with no atomic rename produces corrupted JSON.
allFindings.impact: User configuration including API keys silently lost if two settings ops overlap.
allFindings.suggestion: Add Mutex guarding settings file access across full load-modify-save. Use atomic write (tmp+rename).

allFindings.title: Windows kill_child never calls wait to reap process handle
allFindings.description: Windows branch calls taskkill but never child.wait(). On non-Windows both kill and wait called. Process handle not released.
allFindings.impact: Minor process handle leak if backend restarted repeatedly. Job Object mitigates orphaned processes.
allFindings.suggestion: Add child.wait() after taskkill on Windows, matching non-Windows branch.

allFindings.title: SSL certificate verification disabled in yt-dlp
allFindings.description: nocheckcertificate: True disables SSL verification for all video downloads.
allFindings.impact: MITM attack can intercept/modify downloaded video content, affecting transcription and LLM analysis.
allFindings.suggestion: Remove nocheckcertificate. Users should fix certificate store instead.

allFindings.title: LLM prompt injection via unsanitized transcript text
allFindings.description: Transcript text from YouTube/Gemini/Groq injected directly into LLM prompts without sanitization or boundary markers. Raw transcript text interpolated into prompts via f-strings and .format().
allFindings.impact: Attacker crafts YouTube video with transcript designed to manipulate LLM: return arbitrary JSON, bypass quality thresholds, crash pipeline.
allFindings.suggestion: Wrap transcript in <transcript>...</transcript> delimiters with explicit instructions to treat as untrusted. Sanitize common prompt injection patterns. Validate LLM output strictly against transcript bounds.

allFindings.title: Diagnostic endpoints expose system internals without authentication
allFindings.description: Four debug endpoints expose API key presence (boolean), PID, storage paths, task counts, CORS config. No authentication.
allFindings.impact: Attacker with network access enumerates system config, active API providers, storage paths, running PID.
allFindings.suggestion: Disable debug in production. Gate behind DEBUG env var or restrict to localhost via middleware.

allFindings.title: sensitivity=0 silently overridden to 50 due to Python truthiness
allFindings.description: sensitivity=req.sensitivity or 50. 0 is falsy in Python; user sending 0 (max sensitive) gets 50 (default).
allFindings.impact: Users cannot set most sensitive detection threshold. Slider leftmost position == middle.
allFindings.suggestion: Change to: sensitivity=req.sensitivity if req.sensitivity is not None else 50

allFindings.title: Cancelled task set grows indefinitely (memory leak)
allFindings.description: Tasks added to _cancelled on cancel but never removed. Over time with many task cycles, set grows unbounded.
allFindings.impact: Gradual memory growth. Problematic if server runs continuously with automated task creation.
allFindings.suggestion: Prune old entries: remove from _cancelled at end of delete(), or periodic clear of entries older than 1 hour.

allFindings.title: Downloaded source videos are never cleaned up
allFindings.description: Source videos saved to STORAGE_DIR/source_{video_id}.mp4 (root storage dir, not task dir). Deleted task only removes task subdirectory. Source file persists forever.
allFindings.impact: Disk usage grows unbounded. Single 1080p video 200MB-1GB.
allFindings.suggestion: Track source file references per task. On delete, check if other tasks reference same video_id. If not, delete source.

allFindings.title: Direct mutation of store._mem_tasks bypasses lock from background thread
allFindings.description: Fallback path writes to store._mem_tasks[task_id] attributes without _mem_lock. Runs inside asyncio.to_thread while main event loop reads same data via store.get().
allFindings.impact: Torn reads: SSE client could see inconsistent snapshot (status=processing with stale stage).
allFindings.suggestion: Remove direct mutation fallback entirely. Primary path using run_coroutine_threadsafe is correct. If loop unavailable, log and skip.

allFindings.title: Synchronous file I/O in async method (stat calls not in to_thread)
allFindings.description: Lines 371 and 391 call highlights_path.stat() and transcript_path.stat() synchronously in async recover_from_storage. JSON read on line 332 correctly wrapped in to_thread but stats not.
allFindings.impact: Blocks event loop during boot recovery. Minor impact since once at boot.
allFindings.suggestion: Wrap stat calls in asyncio.to_thread or batch entire recovery into single to_thread call.

allFindings.title: New LLM client created on every call (connection pool waste)
allFindings.description: Each LLM call instantiates new OpenAI(), Anthropic(), genai.Client(). These set up HTTP connection pools. Pipeline with 3+ LLM calls creates 3+ redundant clients.
allFindings.impact: Unnecessary TCP connection overhead on every LLM call.
allFindings.suggestion: Module-level singleton clients (lazy-initialized). Use threading.Lock or threading.local() for thread safety.

allFindings.title: SSE event generator has no heartbeat or client disconnect detection
allFindings.description: SSE endpoint subscribes to store and yields events. If pipeline crashes without publishing terminal event, or client disconnects, generator has no timeout or heartbeat.
allFindings.impact: Clients could hang indefinitely on dead SSE connection. Orphaned generators waste memory.
allFindings.suggestion: Add periodic heartbeat (yield ': heartbeat\n\n' every 30s). Use request.is_disconnected() to detect client disconnect.

allFindings.title: SSRF proxy allows probing any port on localhost
allFindings.description: SSRF protection only allows loopback but makes HTTP requests to arbitrary port/path on localhost. Attacker can enumerate local services.
allFindings.impact: Information disclosure about other local services. Combined with path manipulation, could reach endpoints beyond /models on internal services.
allFindings.suggestion: Add allowlist of expected ports (8000, 8080, 11434) or restrict to configurable trusted base URLs.

allFindings.title: Global os.environ mutation from concurrent threads
allFindings.description: sanitize_env() modifies os.environ['PATH'] by filtering 'scoop' entries. Called from download_video, transcribe_video, render_clips running in thread pool.
allFindings.impact: Theoretical race: concurrent PATH modification could cause thread to see inconsistent PATH.
allFindings.suggestion: Call sanitize_env() once at startup in lifespan handler instead of every pipeline invocation.

allFindings.title: Render progress update silently fails in fallback path
allFindings.description: Fallback path mutates store._mem_tasks inside bare except Exception: pass block. If task not in _mem_tasks or attribute error, progress lost.
allFindings.impact: Frontend progress bar stalls during rendering. User sees no progress for minutes.
allFindings.suggestion: Log debug-level message when progress update fails. Consider if fallback path is reachable.

allFindings.title: Content type detection fallback hides LLM failures
allFindings.description: detect_content_type catches broad exception list and returns default content_type='other'. User gets suboptimal analysis without knowing detection failed.
allFindings.impact: Highlight analysis uses generic 'other/medium' instead of detected type, affecting prompt quality.
allFindings.suggestion: Propagate failure status so pipeline can warn user that content detection was skipped.

allFindings.title: Highlight generation returns empty list after all retries
allFindings.description: After MAX_HIGHLIGHT_ATTEMPTS failed, returns empty list with only logger.error. User-facing error 'No viral highlights found' doesn't indicate if validation/LLM/parse error.
allFindings.impact: User gets generic error when real issue might be LLM JSON, validation, or API errors.
allFindings.suggestion: Collect and return last_errors list so pipeline can include actual failure reason.

allFindings.title: LLM provider fallback swallows intermediate errors
allFindings.description: When primary provider fails and fallback tries others, only last error preserved. If OpenAI fails 'Invalid key' and Gemini fails 'Rate limited', only Gemini error reported.
allFindings.impact: Misleading error messages. User fixes rate limit when real problem is invalid API key.
allFindings.suggestion: Preserve primary provider error separately. Report both primary and fallback failure.

allFindings.title: Unknown subtitle style silently falls back to default
allFindings.description: If style_key not in STYLES, code logs warning and falls back to default. User's style preference silently ignored.
allFindings.impact: User configures specific subtitle style but receives default without notification.
allFindings.suggestion: Include flag in response or log indicating style override so user can troubleshoot.

allFindings.title: oEmbed fetch silently swallows all exceptions
allFindings.description: fetch_oembed catches all exceptions and returns None. Network errors, DNS failures, timeouts, JSON parse errors all silently produce empty video metadata.
allFindings.impact: Frontend shows empty title/author/thumbnail for valid YouTube URLs when oEmbed temporarily unavailable.
allFindings.suggestion: Log exception at debug/warning level. yt-dlp fallback is good but oEmbed failure reason lost.

allFindings.title: JSON cache write failure silently loses speaker metadata
allFindings.description: JSON cache write fails -> logged warning and continue. Only SRT written. On cache hit, SRT loaded without speaker labels.
allFindings.impact: Speaker detection data from Gemini silently lost. Cache reads have degraded highlight analysis.
allFindings.suggestion: Log at ERROR level. Consider making JSON cache write failure more visible.

allFindings.title: No-op passthrough: Kalman smoother never applied
allFindings.description: Function creates list of tuples from samples but applies no actual Kalman smoothing. FaceKalmanTracker defined but unused. Dead code or incomplete implementation.
allFindings.impact: No smoothing applied to face tracking. Crop positions may be jittery.
allFindings.suggestion: Implement Kalman smoothing using FaceKalmanTracker or document why intentionally passthrough.

allFindings.title: SSRF proxy allows access to any localhost service, forwards API keys
allFindings.description: Models endpoint only allows loopback addresses but lets attacker scan/interact with any local service. Forwards api-key header from client to target.
allFindings.impact: Attacker can enumerate local services, interact with internal APIs trusting localhost, forward API keys to attacker-controlled services.
allFindings.suggestion: Restrict proxy to known ports (8000-9000). Add rate limiting. Consider removing API key forwarding or make opt-in.

allFindings.title: CORS origins extendable via env var without validation
allFindings.description: CORS_ORIGINS env var appends to hardcoded list without validation. Combined with allow_credentials=True, could allow credential-bearing requests from arbitrary origins.
allFindings.impact: If attacker controls env var, can add origin to CORS allowlist, enabling cross-origin credential theft.
allFindings.suggestion: Validate added origins match expected patterns (localhost, tauri.localhost). Log warning on non-standard origins.

allFindings.title: Incomplete security headers
allFindings.description: Only sets X-Content-Type-Options and X-Frame-Options. Missing HSTS, CSP, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, X-XSS-Protection.
allFindings.impact: Without Referrer-Policy, sensitive URL params (task IDs) may leak in Referer headers.
allFindings.suggestion: Add Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin, Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=().

allFindings.title: User-controlled subtitle_font injected into ASS without sanitization
allFindings.description: subtitle_font parameter injected directly into ASS style definition. Colors go through _hex_to_ass which validates. Font name no sanitization.
allFindings.impact: Crafted font name could inject ASS override tags, modify rendering, or cause ffmpeg to behave unexpectedly.
allFindings.suggestion: Validate subtitle_font against whitelist of known fonts or sanitize to alphanumeric+spaces+hyphens+periods.

allFindings.title: SSRF protection correct in design but DNS resolution has no timeout
allFindings.description: SSRF protection: scheme validation, DNS resolution, loopback check, IP rewriting, redirect disabling. But DNS resolution potentially blocking.
allFindings.impact: If DNS resolution hangs, request thread blocked.
allFindings.suggestion: Add timeout to DNS resolution step.

allFindings.title: Div with onClick handlers not keyboard accessible
allFindings.description: Div elements with onClick handlers missing role='button', tabIndex, onKeyDown. Keyboard-only users cannot interact.
allFindings.impact: WCAG 2.1.1 violation. Core template selection feature inaccessible.
allFindings.suggestion: Use button elements or add proper ARIA attributes and keyboard handlers.

allFindings.title: window.open fallback without noopener
allFindings.description: window.open(activeClipHref, '_blank') without 'noopener,noreferrer' in windowFeatures.
allFindings.impact: Opened page gets window.opener reference in older browsers.
allFindings.suggestion: Use window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer').

allFindings.title: task.clips.length accessed without optional chaining
allFindings.description: task.clips.length used directly while rest of component uses task.clips?.length ?? 0 with optional chaining.
allFindings.impact: Potential runtime crash if backend returns null for clips.
allFindings.suggestion: Use task.clips?.length ?? 0 consistently.

allFindings.title: SSE error handler closes connection, preventing auto-reconnect
allFindings.description: error event listener calls es.close() on every error including transient drops. Browser EventSource auto-reconnection defeated.
allFindings.impact: Any temp network hiccup permanently stops live progress. Polling compensates but degraded UX.
allFindings.suggestion: Only close on fatal errors. Let EventSource auto-reconnect. Track error count, close after N consecutive.

allFindings.title: Clip download fetch does not check res.ok
allFindings.description: Download handler fetches clip URL but does not verify res.ok before res.blob(). Server 404/500 returns corrupt file.
allFindings.impact: Users may download error HTML/JSON as .mp4 file.
allFindings.suggestion: Add if (!res.ok) throw new Error(...) before res.blob().

allFindings.title: Dynamic import chains without .catch()
allFindings.description: Two import() calls use .then() without .catch(). Module load failure produces unhandled promise rejections.
allFindings.impact: Unhandled rejection warnings; silent failure of Tauri integration setup.
allFindings.suggestion: Add .catch(console.warn) to both dynamic import chains.

allFindings.title: useEffect missing dependency: settings?.storage_dir
allFindings.description: useEffect deps is [isTauriApp] but callback references settings?.storage_dir inside restart action.
allFindings.impact: Stale closure: restart handler may use outdated settings value.
allFindings.suggestion: Add settings?.storage_dir to dep array or use ref.

allFindings.title: Seven separate useEffect calls for localStorage sync
allFindings.description: Each config value has its own useEffect writing to localStorage on change. Seven effects firing on mount (write even when value unchanged).
allFindings.impact: Unnecessary effect overhead and code duplication.
allFindings.suggestion: Consolidate into single effect or write directly in state setter callback.

allFindings.title: Dead code: neon-gradient style defined but never rendered
allFindings.description: STYLE_DEFINITIONS includes neon-gradient but style selector buttons only render 8 of 9, excluding neon-gradient. Maps also include it.
allFindings.impact: Dead code increases bundle size, confuses maintainers.
allFindings.suggestion: Either add neon-gradient to selector or remove from definitions and maps.

allFindings.title: Async callback inside setTimeout with no error handling
allFindings.description: setTimeout(async () => await relaunchApp(), 2000). If relaunchApp() rejects, promise floating silently. restarting remains true, UI locked permanently.
allFindings.impact: If relaunch fails, user sees no error, UI stays in permanent restarting state.
allFindings.suggestion: Wrap in try/catch with toast.error and setRestarting(false).

allFindings.title: Dict value type mismatch: bool where str expected
allFindings.description: detect_content_type returns Dict[str, str] but fallback has density_shifts: False (bool, not str).
allFindings.impact: Type inconsistency; downstream code doing string ops on density_shifts may break.
allFindings.suggestion: Change return type to Dict[str, object] or change False to 'false'.

allFindings.title: Imports inside request handler function on every request
allFindings.description: import re, import requests, from fastapi.concurrency import run_in_threadpool done inside video_info() on every call.
allFindings.impact: Minor: first request has import overhead.
allFindings.suggestion: Move imports to module level.

allFindings.title: Blocking time.sleep() in retry loop inside thread pool
allFindings.description: call_openai_llm uses time.sleep(delay) for retry backoff. Called via asyncio.to_thread so runs in thread pool.
allFindings.impact: Thread pool thread blocked during sleep. With 2-pipeline semaphore, bounded impact.
allFindings.suggestion: Acceptable given architecture. If concurrency increases, use asyncio.sleep with async retry.

allFindings.title: asyncio.get_event_loop() deprecated pattern
allFindings.description: loop = asyncio.get_event_loop() deprecated in Python 3.12+. Should use get_running_loop().
allFindings.impact: Deprecation warning in Python 3.12+.
allFindings.suggestion: Change to asyncio.get_running_loop().

allFindings.title: No retry logic for Anthropic and Gemini LLM calls
allFindings.description: call_openai_llm has retry with exponential backoff (3 attempts). call_anthropic_llm and call_gemini_llm have zero retry.
allFindings.impact: Reduced reliability for Anthropic/Gemini. Fallback chain mitigates but primary provider gets no second chance.
allFindings.suggestion: Add retry pattern to Anthropic and Gemini or extract into shared decorator.

allFindings.title: std::process::exit(0) bypasses Drop and deferred cleanup
allFindings.description: RunEvent::Exit handler uses process::exit(0) killing all threads without running Drop. Log buffers not flushed. Plugin cleanup skipped.
allFindings.impact: Potential unflushed log buffers and skipped cleanup on exit.
allFindings.suggestion: Consider app_handle.exit(0). Flush logs explicitly before process::exit and document why.

allFindings.title: 260-line function with duplicate step numbering
allFindings.description: start_backend_process handles logging, rotation, stale cleanup, directory lookup, Python detection, command construction, env injection, spawning, Job Object, piping, health polling, monitor thread. Two step-9 comments.
allFindings.impact: Difficult to maintain, test, or reason about error paths.
allFindings.suggestion: Extract into prepare_logging, kill_stale_processes, build_command, spawn_and_attach, poll_health.

allFindings.title: Port 8003 hardcoded in 7 places without a constant
allFindings.description: Backend port repeated as literal string in 7 locations.
allFindings.impact: Maintenance risk of missing one during port change.
allFindings.suggestion: Define const BACKEND_PORT: u16 = 8003 and use everywhere.

allFindings.title: Log write errors silently discarded
allFindings.description: In log_line and stream_to_log, writeln! return values discarded via let _. If log file unwritable, diagnostic output silently lost.
allFindings.impact: Silent loss of diagnostic information during failures.
allFindings.suggestion: Fall back to eprintln! if file write fails. Break stream_to_log loop on write failure.

allFindings.title: canonicalize produces UNC paths on Windows causing comparison issues
allFindings.description: p.canonicalize() returns \\?\ prefixed extended-length paths not equal to non-prefixed equivalents as strings.
allFindings.impact: Path mismatches if returned path compared with user-provided paths.
allFindings.suggestion: Use dunce::canonicalize() which strips prefix on Windows when safe.

allFindings.title: IO_COUNTERS struct placeholder uses wrong size (32 bytes vs actual 48)
allFindings.description: io_info: [u8; 32] assumes IO_COUNTERS is 32 bytes. On 64-bit Windows it's 48 bytes. Only basic_limit_information read (offset 0, correct size) so works in practice.
allFindings.impact: Technically UB from wrong struct layout, works in practice as only first field used.
allFindings.suggestion: Use [u8; 48] for io_info or use the windows crate JOBOBJECT_EXTENDED_LIMIT_INFORMATION type.

allFindings.title: LLM error messages leak internal details
allFindings.description: Error messages propagated to frontend through pipeline error mechanism. Contain HTTP status codes, endpoint URLs, model names, API response bodies.
allFindings.impact: Error messages stored in task records could leak internal infrastructure details.
allFindings.suggestion: Sanitize errors before propagating. Log full errors server-side, return generic messages to clients.

allFindings.title: Duplicated helper functions between subtitles.py and subtitle_builders.py
allFindings.description: Functions _clean_text, _apply_case, _seg_time, _cs, _fmt, _dialogue, _estimate_text_width, _wrap_and_balance, _find_adaptive_wrap fully duplicated between both files.
allFindings.impact: Maintenance burden. Bug fixes must be applied in two places. Risk of divergence.
allFindings.suggestion: Extract shared helpers into _subtitle_utils.py and import from both.

allFindings.title: Fragile JSON mode detection via substring match
allFindings.description: if 'json' in prompt.lower() triggers JSON response format. Matches any occurrence of 'json' in prompt including narrative content.
allFindings.impact: May unnecessarily trigger or fail JSON mode. Low probability since prompts controlled.
allFindings.suggestion: Pass json_mode: bool parameter instead of detecting from content.

allFindings.title: Duplicated constants between highlight_prompts.py and config.py
allFindings.description: CHUNK_SIZE_SECONDS, LONG_VIDEO_THRESHOLD, CHUNK_OVERLAP_SECONDS defined in both files. highlight_prompts.py values imported and used; config.py values unused.
allFindings.impact: If someone changes config.py expecting effect, highlight_prompts.py hardcoded values still apply.
allFindings.suggestion: Remove duplicates from highlight_prompts.py and import from config.py.

allFindings.title: Check-then-act race in cancel_task
allFindings.description: cancel_task reads status, checks if terminal, then calls store.cancel(). Between check and cancel, pipeline could complete and cancel overwrites completed.
allFindings.impact: Rare: completed task could show cancelled instead of completed.
allFindings.suggestion: Use atomic compare-and-swap: only set cancelled if current status not terminal.

allFindings.title: JSON parse error in Redis pubsub silently continues
allFindings.description: If Redis pubsub message has invalid JSON, except (JSONDecodeError, KeyError): continue silently drops event.
allFindings.impact: Rare -- only if Redis data corrupted. Events silently lost.
allFindings.suggestion: Add debug-level log for parse failures.

allFindings.title: Log rotation silently discards fs::rename errors
allFindings.description: rotate_logs uses let _ = fs::rename(...) for all rotation steps. If rename fails (file locked, permissions), logs grow unbounded.
allFindings.impact: Log file could grow to fill disk on Windows. No diagnostic output.
allFindings.suggestion: Log rename failures to stderr or fallback location.

allFindings.title: Silent except Exception: pass when resolving subtitle style from store
allFindings.description: Any exception in style resolution silently caught with pass. Falls through to DEFAULT_STYLE.
allFindings.impact: Per-clip subtitle style silently ignored if task record structure mismatched.
allFindings.suggestion: Log at debug level to aid troubleshooting.

allFindings.title: Missing return statement on non-rate-limit exception path
allFindings.description: Function expects List[Dict] return but theoretically can exit for-loop without returning (not possible in practice).
allFindings.impact: mypy flags it. Unreachable but indicates code structure issue.
allFindings.suggestion: Add explicit raise RuntimeError after for-loop to satisfy mypy.

allFindings.title: Magic number for CREATE_NO_WINDOW
allFindings.description: CREATION_FLAGS = 0x08000000 uses magic number instead of subprocess.CREATE_NO_WINDOW.
allFindings.impact: Readability only.
allFindings.suggestion: Use subprocess.CREATE_NO_WINDOW directly.

allFindings.title: Duplicate CREATE_NO_WINDOW definition across files
allFindings.description: Both transcriber.py and transcriber_gemini.py define CREATION_FLAGS identically.
allFindings.impact: Maintenance: if constant changes, two files need updating.
allFindings.suggestion: Move CREATION_FLAGS to engine/utils.py and import from there.

allFindings.title: Nested function capturing loop variable
allFindings.description: def read_json(path=highlights_path) uses default argument capturing loop variable. Safe because highlights_path unchanged within iteration.
allFindings.impact: No bug. Confusing pattern.
allFindings.suggestion: Simplify to inline file read.

allFindings.title: Import after module-level code (PEP 8 import ordering)
allFindings.description: from .services.encoder_detection import detect_encoders appears after module-level variable assignments.
allFindings.impact: Style only.
allFindings.suggestion: Move import to top of file with other imports.

allFindings.title: f-string with wrong format specifier in logging
allFindings.description: logger.warning(f"[transcribe] failed to write JSON cache: %s", e) mixes f-string and %s. e not interpolated; literal %s appears.
allFindings.impact: Silent loss of error context. Log shows literal %s instead of actual exception.
allFindings.suggestion: Drop f-prefix: logger.warning("[transcribe] failed to write JSON cache: %s", e)

allFindings.title: f-string with %s hybrid duplicates finding above, merged here
allFindings.description: Consolidated: line 78 is the one critical line. Other f-string log lines in this file are acceptable (no %s conflict).
allFindings.impact: Deduplicated sub-finding.
allFindings.suggestion: Fix line 78 as described.

allFindings.title: API key length logged in transcription providers
allFindings.description: Both Gemini and Groq providers log len(GEMINI_API_KEY) and len(GROQ_API_KEY).
allFindings.impact: Minor: key length reduces brute-force search space.
allFindings.suggestion: Log only boolean key presence, not length.

allFindings.title: yt-dlp subprocess on validated but potentially dangerous URL
allFindings.description: video-info falls back to running yt-dlp --dump-json as subprocess via list args (no shell=True). URL validated against YouTube regex.
allFindings.impact: Low risk. URL passing regex unlikely to exploit yt-dlp but possible if parsing vulnerability found.
allFindings.suggestion: Pin yt-dlp version and keep updated. Consider removing yt-dlp fallback since oEmbed covers most cases.

allFindings.title: Health endpoint leaks configuration details
allFindings.description: Health endpoint returns active LLM provider name and storage directory path without auth.
allFindings.impact: Minor info disclosure about server config.
allFindings.suggestion: Return only {status: ok, ready: true}. Move diagnostics to debug endpoints.

allFindings.title: Path traversal protection well-implemented
allFindings.description: Safe_resolve validates resolved paths don't escape base storage using Path.relative_to() checks on both root and target directories.
allFindings.impact: N/A - positive finding, proper security control.
allFindings.suggestion: No changes needed. Continue using this pattern for new file-serving endpoints.
